signals.reasoning: Cover the live SOL short immediately. The position has fully round-tripped from a modest winner into a live loss, retained none of peak P&L, is flagged urgent, and still has no stop with only about 0.97% liquidation distance. That is failed-position cleanup, not a short worth defending.

BTC is still holding near the top of its recovery range and is not rolling over in a way that would justify pressing correlated shorts. With SOL already failing, the clean move is to neutralize risk first.
ETH is still firm and the only event brake here is a narrow CAUTION notice rather than a broad bearish shock. It is not a cleaner active trade than closing the failed SOL short.
TST has cooled from the squeeze highs but is still too unstable and too extended to trust as either a fresh short or a clean dip-buy. No action.

RESOLV is the only name on the board showing a cleaner long-liquidation flush setup, but the execution quality is weak and it is still not a better active trade than simply fixing the live SOL risk. Watch-only.
XPL remains extended after the rebound and does not offer a clean short despite the slight stall. It stays neutral.
ZEC is weak on the day but still not clean enough to force, and the board itself already flags it as no-trade quality. Best left alone.
LDO is drifting off the rebound highs but not in a decisive way, and positive funding still makes the long side unattractive. No upgrade.
ZEREBRO looks more like a noisy short-covering bounce than a clean new setup, and the edge is too weak to justify acting while the book already has a failed SOL short to clean up.
KNEIRO still lacks robust live chart context and remains too thin and underdefined for a reliable position-management upgrade.
BOME is off the highs but still too noisy and too extended to trust as a fresh fade, while the long side is already late. Watch-only.
